top_strength: Hector ran the most complete probe of any rep in this batch — covering floors, elevator proximity, walk distance, sq footage, boxes, appliances, TVs, balcony, and plants — with natural rapport throughout.
coaching_note: Save Your Ass is completely absent — a customer openly shopping around was a prime candidate for the prep speech to differentiate Einstein and lower her perceived risk.
phone_presence_notes: Hector's warmth was consistent — 'Congratulations on the upgrade,' the plant humor moment, natural 'Awesome' affirmations — and Jisel stayed engaged throughout.
